testcase.name: test_mint_nft_success_and_idempotent

error.message:
failed on setup with "AssertionError: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_acn_nft_soc2_hscs.py:61: in sealed_packet assert r2.status_code == 200, r2.text E AssertionError: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_public_verify_includes_nft

error.message:
failed on setup with "AssertionError: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_acn_nft_soc2_hscs.py:61: in sealed_packet assert r2.status_code == 200, r2.text E AssertionError: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
